description_long: This is a medium-sized, irregularly shaped stone with a rugged, angular form and a predominantly brownish-gray coloration. The surface is marked by a mix of rough, jagged textures and some smoother, weathered patches, suggesting natural erosion and exposure to the elements. Subtle yellowish and ochre tones are visible, especially along the edges and crevices, indicating mineral deposits or staining. The stone's mass and density are apparent from its solid, compact appearance, with no visible cavities or significant fractures. Its overall form is asymmetrical, with one side appearing more flattened and the other more sharply contoured. The stone would be a common sight in urban parks, roadside barriers, or landscaped public spaces, serving as a natural obstacle or decorative element.
description: A rugged, brownish-gray stone with jagged textures, subtle yellowish highlights, and an irregular, asymmetrical shape. Its surface shows signs of natural weathering and mineral staining.
description_view_0: This view highlights the broad, uneven top surface with visible layering and a mix of brown and gray tones.
description_view_1: This angle shows a narrower, more angular side with pronounced yellowish mineral deposits and rougher texture.
description_view_2: The elongated side is visible here, displaying a blend of ochre and gray hues with a more linear, striated surface.
description_view_3: This view reveals a pointed, rugged end with deep crevices and a darker, more weathered appearance.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or natural barrier on the ground
attribute_pattern: Irregular mottling and subtle layering with mineral streaks and patches of discoloration; no artificial carvings or regular patterns.
attribute_weathering: Rough and weathered with visible signs of natural erosion, minor surface pitting, and some mineral staining.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Blends naturally with soil, gravel, or other stones; may contrast with paved surfaces but integrates well in landscaped or naturalistic settings.
